Epoch Analysis

K-means clustering, composite scoring, and anomaly detection for any epoch.

Enter an epoch number and click Analyze to see results.

Trust Graph

Sybil detection, whale dependency, and coordination risk analysis.

Enter an epoch number and click Build Trust Graph to see results.

Mechanism Simulation

Compare funding mechanisms: Standard QF, Capped, Equal-weight, and Trust-Weighted.

Enter an epoch number and click Simulate to compare mechanisms.

Analyze Project

Full project analysis with SSE streaming: data, trust, simulation, AI scoring, and report generation.
